smart_query: Renewable energy sources global market trends

analysis.summary: Изследването на оса ENERGY_REVIEW показва, че компании като Peak Energy и RWE развиват натрий-ионни батерии в Уисконсин. Това развитие е важно за създаването на устойчива цивилизация. Осветлението на фундаменталните проблеми в енергетиката е също така от изключителна важност.
key_developments: Peak Energy and RWE deploying sodium-ion battery in Wisconsin
Utilities should focus on the fundamentals – Emerson’s Sally Jacquemin | DTECH Interview Studio
analysis.scientific_frontier: Neural Field Thermal Tomography: A Differentiable Physics Framework for Non-Destructive Evaluation, DynVLA: Learning World Dynamics for Action Reasoning in Autonomous Driving
analysis.relevance_to_goal: Висока, тъй като развитието на устойчиви енергийни технологии е от изключителна важност за създаването на устойчива цивилизация и достойнство за всички.

arxiv_papers.title: Neural Field Thermal Tomography: A Differentiable Physics Framework for Non-Destructive Evaluation
arxiv_papers.snippet: We propose Neural Field Thermal Tomography (NeFTY), a differentiable physics framework for the quantitative 3D reconstruction of material properties from transient surface temperature measurements. While traditional thermography relies on pixel-wise 1D approximations that neglect lateral diffusion,

arxiv_papers.title: DynVLA: Learning World Dynamics for Action Reasoning in Autonomous Driving
arxiv_papers.snippet: We propose DynVLA, a driving VLA model that introduces a new CoT paradigm termed Dynamics CoT. DynVLA forecasts compact world dynamics before action generation, enabling more informed and physically grounded decision-making.
